name: Med-PaLM 2
tagline: Expert-level medical Q&A, delivered as MedLM
metaDescription: Med-PaLM 2 is Google's medical large language model that reached expert-level USMLE-style question answering and powers the MedLM API on Google Cloud Vertex AI.
status: Available via Vertex AI (MedLM), allowlisted customers
overview: Med-PaLM 2 is a medical large language model from Google, built by fine-tuning the PaLM 2 model on medical data. It was the first AI system to reach expert level on USMLE-style questions from the MedQA benchmark, scoring 86.5%.

In a study of consumer medical questions, a panel of physicians preferred Med-PaLM 2's answers over physician-written answers across most of the axes the study measured. The model powers MedLM, a family of healthcare-tuned foundation models that Google offers to allowlisted Google Cloud customers through the Vertex AI platform.
strengths: Expert-level accuracy on USMLE-style medical question answering
Tuned specifically for medical and healthcare use
Available as a managed API (MedLM) on Google Cloud Vertex AI
useCases: Answering medical exam-style and clinical knowledge questions
Summarizing and drafting healthcare documentation within Google Cloud
Powering healthcare applications built on Vertex AI

links.label: Toward expert-level medical question answering with LLMs
